# Floating Point → Float Normalize

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Floating Point → Float Normalize

Float Normalize

Instruction Type and Width            Instruction description
                                      Performs normalization of the mantissa and updates the
Vector Floating Point Normalization   exponent field accordingly. This instruction is part of the non-
                                      native VFLPADD, VFLPSUB operations.
